content:
I am a URC Postdoctoral Fellow at HKU Business School, The University of Hong Kong, and hold a Ph.D. in Finance from Sun Yat-sen University. My work has appeared in Financial Review, Journal of Business Research, and Technological Forecasting and Social Change, among others. I serve as an Assistant Editor of International Review of Finance.
I have received the Job Market Star recognition at the China Economics Annual Conference, the China Excellent Young Scholar Paper Award in Finance, and the Top-Ranked Paper distinction in the 13th Guangdong Provincial Award for Excellence in Financial Research.

title: Cunyi YANG 杨存奕
